mapper.select: SELECT u.usr_id, u.usr_nm, u.usr_pw, u.email, u.phone, u.dept_nm, u.role_cd, u.use_yn, u.pwd_chg_dt, u.last_login_dt, u.login_fail_cnt, u.lock_yn, u.created_at, u.created_by, u.updated_at, u.updated_by, c.code_nm AS role_nm FROM usr u LEFT JOIN com_code c ON c.grp_cd = 'USR_ROLE' AND c.code = u.role_cd WHERE u.usr_id = #{usrId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO usr (usr_id, usr_nm, usr_pw, email, phone, dept_nm, role_cd, use_yn, lock_yn, created_by) VALUES (#{usrId}, #{usrNm}, #{usrPw}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{deptNm}, #{roleCd}, #{useYn}, #{lockYn}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE usr SET usr_nm = #{usrNm}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, dept_nm = #{deptNm}, role_cd = #{roleCd}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE usr_id = #{usrId}
UPDATE usr SET usr_pw = #{usrPw}, pwd_chg_dt = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE usr_id = #{usrId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM usr WHERE usr_id = #{usrId}
